title: Specialties add range
summary: Rauchbier and Kellerbier show German beer's range.

signals.title: Rauchbier
signals.body: Smoked malt creates campfire or bacon notes.

signals.title: Kellerbier
signals.body: Unfiltered lager can taste softer and rounder.

signals.title: Seasonals
signals.body: Festbier and Maibock follow the calendar.

signals.title: Curiosity
signals.body: The edge still depends on balance.

guardrails.title: Use examples
guardrails.body: One named style is clearer than a long list.

guardrails.title: Balance
guardrails.body: Even bold styles should stay drinkable.
